rss.title: Satellite Spots a Spawn
rss.snippet: The activity of herring around Vancouver Island in British Columbia brightened coastal waters enough to be detectable from space.

rss.title: What’s Up: April 2026 Skywatching Tips from NASA
rss.snippet: Mercury shines at its brightest for the year, the Lyrid meteor shower peaks, and a bright new comet makes an appearance in April’s night sky.

arxiv_papers.title: Exoplanet Search and Characterization with the Proposed POET Canadian Space Mission
arxiv_papers.snippet: The Photometric Observations of Exoplanet Transits (POET) is a proposed micro-satellite mission dedicated to the characterization and discovery of transiting exoplanets.
